name: Surprise Coconut Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: Whipping cream, whipped and sweetened (for garnish)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil. Stir in the grits.
2. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from the heat and stir in the sugar and butter/margarine.
4. Gradually add about one-quarter of the hot mixture to the bowl containing the beaten eggs, stirring constantly.
5. Add the egg mixture to the remaining hot mixture, stirring continuously.
6. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens and reaches 160°F (about 8 minutes).
7. Stir in the flaked coconut and sour cream. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie crust.
8. Cover and chill. Garnish with whipped cream and sweetened cream, and maraschino cherries if desired.
Makes one 9-inch pie.
